text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 89 

LT header 
OT header 

VALUES: Y = Diagnosis was present at time of inpatient admission 
N = Diagnosis was not present at time of inpatient admission 
U = Documentation insufficient to determine if condition was present at the time of inpatient 
admission 
W = Clinically undetermined. Provider unable to clinically determine whether the condition was 
present at the time of inpatient
